zh.Sotby, Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾索特比
zh.Hackthorn, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾哈可
zh.Setby, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾索特比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon Fitzwilliam de Kyme於1094年出生在英國林可爾史爾索特比時，他的父親William de Kyme30歲，母親Coates15歲。他和Agnes Lindsey至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於大約1162年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾哈可享年69歲。

zh-hans.Sotby, Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾索特比
zh-hans.Hackthorn, Lincolnshire, England: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾哈可
zh-hans.Setby, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾索特比
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon Fitzwilliam de Kyme于1094年出生在英国林可爾史爾索特比时，他的父亲William de Kyme30岁，母亲Coates15岁。他和Agnes Lindsey至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于大约1162年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾哈可享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kyme
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from North or South Kyme (Lincs).

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Fitzwilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon Fitzwilliam de Kyme was born in 1094, in Sotby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, William de Kyme, was 30 and his mother, Coates, was 15. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Agnes Lindsey. He died about 1162, in Hackthorn, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon Fitzwilliam de Kyme est né en 1094, à Sotby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Kyme, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Coates, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Agnes Lindsey. Il est décédé environ 1162, à Hackthorn, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon Fitzwilliam de Kyme 1094 in Sotby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Kyme 30 und seine Mutter Coates 15. Er hatte mit Agnes Lindsey mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1162 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Hackthorn, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Fitzwilliam de Kyme è nato il nel 1094 nel Sotby, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, William de Kyme, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Coates, aveva 15 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Agnes Lindsey. Morì circa 1162, nel Hackthorn, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon Fitzwilliam de Kymeが1094年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアソトビーで生まれた時，父William de Kymeは30歳，母Coatesは15歳であった。彼はAgnes Lindseyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1162年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアハクソルンで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon Fitzwilliam de Kyme(이)가 1094년 영국 링코실르 소트비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Kyme(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Coates(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Agnes Lindsey(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1162년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 해ck토른에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Fitzwilliam de Kyme nasceu em 1094, em Sotby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Kyme, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Coates, tinha 15 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Agnes Lindsey. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1162, em Hackthorn, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon Fitzwilliam de Kyme родился в 1094 г. в местности сотби, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Kyme было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Coates, 15. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Agnes Lindsey. Он умер около 1162 г. в местности хакктаурн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon Fitzwilliam de Kyme nació en 1094, en Sotby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Kyme, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Coates, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Agnes Lindsey. Murió aproximadamente 1162, en Hackthorn, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años.
